implemented_change.summary: Drive timeline_context under the v1 10% unknown threshold with deterministic work-plan agenda and public-meeting timeline lanes.

rules.name: work_plan_agenda_items
required_signals: citing source record exists and is work-plan/workplan shaped
relation is an agenda item edge with event/entity/claim/metric-claim shape already present in the canonical records
dated agenda-item event when the object is the event

rules.name: dated_public_meeting_timeline_events
required_signals: event object is public_engagement with a board/committee/community/public meeting kind
subject is a source, entity, corridor, or event
citing source record exists and is not work-plan/workplan shaped
event and citing-source dates are comparable month/day dates for source-relative planned/delivered classification
explicit held/minutes wording only falls back when comparable dates are absent
classification: event date on or before source date is delivered unless the text is still an approval/vote agenda request
event date after source date is planned only with scheduled/will/recommended/to-approve/to-adopt/to-vote/to-consider/for-approval/for-board-action language

verification.result: passed: Materialized 93067/98119 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check ok

intentionally_unresolved: Work-plan no-item/no-meeting agenda rows remain unknown.
Meeting timeline edges with future event dates and no explicit future/scheduled signal remain unknown.
Approval/vote agenda-request text remains unknown when the meeting date is on or before the source date.
Small residual non-agenda/non-has_timeline_event relation kinds remain outside this lane because the family clears the v1 threshold.
next_candidate_lanes: Continue Plan 004 with claim_context, the only remaining target family above 10%.
Do not broaden timeline_context further for v1 unless downstream consumers expose a specific residual timeline gap.
